name: Unified Compression Field
locked_claims: gravity, extended compression, local Mass Effect, and Mirror-Gate boundary response are views of one field
Mass Effect and the 125 GeV gate are different responses of the same four-interaction architecture
White Energy is outward reinjection, not space expansion
equations: closed static accounting includes photon, compression, return-mode, compact-reservoir, and White-Energy densities
F=M*a+C*v with drag separated from Mass Effect
claim_gate_detail: YELLOW (field decomposition and static-loop equations) / GREEN (physical identity claims and coefficients)
